allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(auth\): prevent open redirect vulnerability in auth flows

Add URL validation to prevent attackers from redirecting users to
malicious sites after authentication. The fix validates redirect URLs
against NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL or allows only relative paths.

- Add getSafeRedirectUrl utility in packages/features/auth/utils/
- Apply validation to sign-in-form, magic-link-form, oauth-buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
